requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Rwanda Local Fire and Building Authority Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——卢旺达当地消防和建筑主管机关要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——盧旺達當地消防和建築主管機關要求

summary.en: Fire safety and building authority approval for BESS installations in Rwanda falls under local fire authority and Rwanda Housing Authority (RHA) building permit requirements, coordinated with RURA licensing conditions. Rwanda does not currently have a confirmed standalone national BESS fire-installation standard equivalent to NFPA 855 or a formally published national adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for stationary BESS as of the dataset date. In practice, DFI-financed BESS projects in Rwanda reference international fire-safety standards in project technical specifications — commonly IEC 62933-5-1 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) and IEC 62933-5-2 for electrochemical-based systems. Project-level fire-safety design is typically reviewed by the project owner's independent engineer (IE) and may reference NFPA 855 or IEC equivalents. Building permits for BESS enclosures and container installations require Rwanda Housing Authority review. Installers should verify current local fire and building authority requirements directly with the relevant district authorities and RURA before project commissioning. BESS fire-safety equipment certifications from internationally recognised laboratories (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV, SGS, TÜV) are expected for project and authority acceptance.
summary.zh: 卢旺达BESS安装的消防安全和建筑主管机关批准属于当地消防机关和卢旺达住房局（RHA）建筑许可要求的范畴，并与RURA许可条件协调执行。截至本数据集日期，卢旺达尚无经确认的独立国家BESS消防安装标准，与NFPA 855相当，也未正式发布专门针对固定式BESS的NFPA 855国家采纳规定。实践中，卢旺达DFI融资BESS项目在项目技术规格中引用国际消防安全标准——通常为IEC 62933-5-1（储能系统——安全考量——危害识别、风险评估和风险缓解）和针对电化学系统的IEC 62933-5-2。项目级消防安全设计通常由项目业主的独立工程师（IE）审查，可能引用NFPA 855或IEC等效标准。BESS机柜和集装箱装置的建筑许可须经卢旺达住房局审查。安装方应在项目调试前直接向相关区级主管机关和RURA核实现行当地消防和建筑主管机关要求。来自国际认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV、SGS、TÜV）的BESS消防安全设备认证是项目和主管机关验收的预期要求。
summary.zht: 盧旺達BESS安裝的消防安全和建築主管機關批准屬於當地消防機關和盧旺達住房局（RHA）建築許可要求的範疇，並與RURA許可條件協調執行。截至本數據集日期，盧旺達尚無經確認的獨立國家BESS消防安裝標準，與NFPA 855相當，也未正式發布專門針對固定式BESS的NFPA 855國家採納規定。實踐中，盧旺達DFI融資BESS項目在項目技術規格中引用國際消防安全標準——通常為IEC 62933-5-1（儲能系統——安全考量——危害識別、風險評估和風險緩解）和針對電化學系統的IEC 62933-5-2。項目級消防安全設計通常由項目業主的獨立工程師（IE）審查，可能引用NFPA 855或IEC等效標準。BESS機櫃和集裝箱裝置的建築許可須經盧旺達住房局審查。安裝方應在項目調試前直接向相關區級主管機關和RURA核實現行當地消防和建築主管機關要求。來自國際認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV、SGS、TÜV）的BESS消防安全設備認證是項目和主管機關驗收的預期要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard commonly referenced in Rwanda DFI project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected DFI project-specification reference)

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (international reference commonly adopted in DFI project specifications; formal Rwanda national adoption for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with local fire authority and RURA)
Rwanda Housing Authority (RHA) — building permit authority for BESS enclosures and container installations
RURA — Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority — licensing conditions may include fire-safety and installation requirements

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes mandatory fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law (2021 revision). These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised in Rwanda as equivalent to international IEC or NFPA-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 aligned design documentation for DFI project review and Rwanda local authority approval.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起实施）包含BESS电芯和模组的强制消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由《消防法》（2021年修订）下的地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被卢旺达认可为等同于国际IEC或基于NFPA的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在DFI项目审查和卢旺达当地主管机关批准中补充符合IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起實施）包含BESS電芯和模組的強制消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由《消防法》（2021年修訂）下的地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被盧旺達認可為等同於國際IEC或基於NFPA的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在DFI項目審查和盧旺達當地主管機關批准中補充符合IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Local fire and building authority approval is a mandatory project gate for BESS installations in Rwanda. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Rwanda's IEC-based project requirements or local fire authority expectations. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm current fire-safety installation requirements directly with the relevant district fire authority, Rwanda Housing Authority, and RURA before project design is finalised; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-1 hazard assessment and IEC 62933-5-2 safety requirements — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire-suppression system equipment carries certification from an internationally recognised laboratory (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV, SGS, or TÜV) where required by the project owner or local authority; (d) engage a fire protection engineer experienced in DFI-financed African energy projects for design review and authority submissions; (e) confirm whether NFPA 855 is referenced in the project specification or RURA licensing conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：当地消防和建筑主管机关批准是卢旺达BESS安装的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足卢旺达基于IEC的项目要求或当地消防主管机关期望。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在项目设计最终确定前直接向相关区级消防主管机关、卢旺达住房局和RURA确认现行消防安全安装要求；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-1危害评估和IEC 62933-5-2安全要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）在项目业主或当地主管机关要求时，确保消防抑制系统设备经国际认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV、SGS或TÜV）认证；（d）聘请具有DFI融资非洲能源项目经验的消防工程师进行设计审查和主管机关申报；（e）确认项目规格或RURA许可条件中是否引用NFPA 855。
gap.zht: 差距：當地消防和建築主管機關批准是盧旺達BESS安裝的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足盧旺達基於IEC的項目要求或當地消防主管機關期望。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在項目設計最終確定前直接向相關區級消防主管機關、盧旺達住房局和RURA確認現行消防安全安裝要求；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-1危害評估和IEC 62933-5-2安全要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）在項目業主或當地主管機關要求時，確保消防抑制系統設備經國際認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV、SGS或TÜV）認證；（d）聘請具有DFI融資非洲能源項目經驗的消防工程師進行設計審查和主管機關申報；（e）確認項目規格或RURA許可條件中是否引用NFPA 855。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local fire authority and Rwanda Housing Authority approvals required for BESS installations; RURA licensing conditions may include fire-safety requirements; specific fire code for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with local fire authority and RURA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Local fire and building authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for BESS in Rwanda. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Rwanda's IEC-based project requirements or local authority expectations. Confirm the applicable fire-safety installation code (including whether NFPA 855 or an IEC equivalent is referenced in RURA licensing conditions or the project specification) and prepare IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 aligned design documentation before committing to system layout or equipment specification. Engage a fire protection engineer with DFI-financed African energy project experience at the earliest project stage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当地消防和建筑主管机关批准是卢旺达BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足卢旺达基于IEC的项目要求或当地主管机关期望。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，确认适用消防安全安装规范（包括NFPA 855或IEC等效标准是否在RURA许可条件或项目规格中被引用），并准备符合IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2要求的设计文件。在项目最早阶段聘请具有DFI融资非洲能源项目经验的消防工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當地消防和建築主管機關批准是盧旺達BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足盧旺達基於IEC的項目要求或當地主管機關期望。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，確認適用消防安全安裝規範（包括NFPA 855或IEC等效標準是否在RURA許可條件或項目規格中被引用），並準備符合IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2要求的設計文件。在項目最早階段聘請具有DFI融資非洲能源項目經驗的消防工程師。
